task_completion.description: Page 1 is a title page with the correct title, subtitle, and name line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page containing the text 'Charlotte's Web' as the main title, 'By E.B. White' as the subtitle, and a line for 'Name: ___________'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains the title 'Comprehension Questions' and at least three numbered questions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page with the title 'Comprehension Questions' and a list of at least three numbered questions related to the story.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains the title 'Character Analysis' and three labeled rectangle boxes for Wilbur, Charlotte, and Fern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page with the title 'Character Analysis'. There should be three distinct rectangle shapes drawn on the page, and the names 'Wilbur', 'Charlotte', and 'Fern' should be visible as text labeling these boxes.

task_completion.description: Page 4 contains the title 'Theme and Message' and text prompts about the book's theme and lesson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page with the title 'Theme and Message' and text that prompts students to write about the theme or lesson of the book.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file explorer window, or application title bar showing the file saved as 'charlottes_web_guide.flipchart' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI application (like ActivInspire) to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the interface of a presentation or interactive whiteboard software (e.g., ActivInspire), not a text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent drew actual rectangle shapes for the character analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: On page 3, the boxes should be actual graphical rectangle shapes created using a shape tool, not ASCII art (like [   ]) or just text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'touch charlottes_web_guide.flipchart' or scripts generating the file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Charlotte's Web is by E.B. White. The main characters are Wilbur (pig), Charlotte (spider), and Fern (girl). The task requires a 4-page flipchart (typically ActivInspire) saved as 'charlottes_web_guide.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'. Page 3 must contain exactly 3 rectangle shapes labeled with the characters' names.
